title: Grenfell Tower Inquiry Phase 2 Report: Government response
body: "The government’s response to the Grenfell Tower Inquiry’s Phase 2 report sets out the steps we are taking to implement the report’s recommendations at pace, as well as the wider work we are doing to make buildings safer.  A summary of our response is also available in 11 languages.  May 2025 update  The government’s first Grenfell Tower Inquiry Government Progress Report was published on 29 May 2025. "
